input.headline: As it happened World Cup 2026 playoffs draw: reaction and updates

raw.headline: As it happened World Cup 2026 playoffs draw: reaction and updates

winner: I was surprised when the World Cup 2026 playoffs drew were announced—turns out they’re just using a giant spinning globe like we did in middle school for science fairs. The world’s reaction? Mostly crickets, which is fitting because it’s also the official theme song.

candidates.text: Why did the soccer player refuse to play in the World Cup 2026 playoff? Because he didn't want to get "drawn into" anything.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, uses a play on words with 'drawn into,' which relates to the headline's mention of the playoffs draw. It’s somewhat surprising and specific to the context, though the humor is mild and could be seen as generic in a broader sense."}

candidates.text: I'm so glad I didn't qualify for the World Cup, because apparently the playoffs are just a series of increasingly terrible penalties.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, specific, and uses a relatable sports reference with a twist. It's slightly generic in its surprise element but still effective."}

candidates.text: I was surprised when the World Cup 2026 playoffs drew were announced—turns out they’re just using a giant spinning globe like we did in middle school for science fairs. The world’s reaction? Mostly crickets, which is fitting because it’s also the official theme song.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever with a good twist on the 'draw' pun and the reference to middle school science fairs. However, the second part about crickets and the theme song feels slightly forced and less impactful."}

candidates.text: What did the soccer player say when his team got eliminated in the playoffs? "Well, at least I didn't have to worry about getting a yellow card for being late to my own draw!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the wordplay on 'draw' (both a soccer event and a scheduling term), but it's a bit forced and lacks specificity to the World Cup 2026 playoffs context."}

candidates.text: The World Cup 2026 playoffs draw was so intense, even the penalty kickers needed a timeout for dramatic effect.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is concise and uses a surprising twist by personifying the penalty kickers, but it lacks specificity about the draw itself and feels slightly generic in its humor."}
